creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to tfagart from comment #14)
That's a bit weird. addr2line(1) does not give sound source line number.

```
$ addr2line -fip -e /.zfs/snapshot/14.1-p5/usr/lib/debug/boot/kernel/kernel.debug 0xffffffff80e1c558
svcerr_progvers at /usr/src/sys/rpc/svc.c:864
```
